subcodes.first_line: The heaven of divine Tablets is luminous and resplendent with the mention of the Day-star of steadfastness, even as hath been recorded in most Tablets [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: آسمان الواح الهی بذکر نیر استقامت منیر و روشن است چنانچه در اکثر الواح ذکر
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @praise and encouragement, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
